channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.description:
Tree fallen on road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crockenhill Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London

item.description:
The animal is dead… in the road

item.title: Fly Tipping dumped items by bin corner Amhurst Road and Downs Park Road., 13th March
item.description:
Fly Tipping dumped items by bin corner Amhurst Road and Downs Park Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Flytipping by truck with registration number EX24 NXE, 13th March
item.description:
Flytipping by truck with registration number EX24 NXE Truck driver said Greenwich Council will be collecting them.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly topping us a CONSTANT problem here. A bjsiness friend visiting me asked me why I live in a ghetto!!, 13th March
item.description:
We need a permanent solution. This has been going on for years. You may have to gate off the area and give only residents an access code. We have suffered too long. No one would want to buy or rent our homes. We expect better from a Royal Borough.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nightingale Vale, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter strewn all down the street, 13th March
item.description:
There is excessive litter strewn all down Finsbury Park Road once again. This continues to be a problem and the street cleaner appears to only attend to the top half of the road and the lower half is always littered with rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Finsbury Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 13th March
item.description:
Right in the middle of the pavement. Sorry couldn’t pick it up to move it out of the way. Blocking pavement access. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hylton Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Fly Tipping dumped shelving unit near 127 Amhurst Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Excessive lots of rubbish near 115 Amhurst Road., 13th March
item.description:
Excessive lots of rubbish near 115 Amhurst Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Black overflowing sacks of food waste, 13th March
item.description:
As title. Attracting Vermin. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookdene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barrier blown off, jagged metal doors exposed, 13th March
item.description:
The large plastic 3 piece (or 2 piece?) barrier blew down in the wind, onto/across the narrow pavement/corner pavement. A danger to pedestrians and particularly the poor-sighted. The broken jagged doors are now exposed and could cause someone an injury for which I would have thought Bromley would be responsible for a claim. The barrier is currently wedged behind the comms box. It is not good enough that this has remained unfixed for so many months despite being reported long ago.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16-18, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bike frame, 13th March
item.description:
Abandoned bike frame
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rivington Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint spilled in road, 13th March
item.description:
Looks like someone has spilled a pot of white paint in the middle of the road, and it's being driven all along the street by cars.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albert Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: LTN camera vandalised, 13th March
item.description:
The LTN camera has been pushed upwards so it faces away from people driving through the LTN

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nevill Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: CCTV for Low Traffic Neighbourhood Enforcement

item.title: Flytipping around bin, 13th March
item.description:
Multiple item left in and beside the green bin outside Christ Central Church, so that bin now overflowing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Penge, Greater London

item.title: A Fly Tipping on Street problem has been found, 13th March
item.description:
Recycling bags/boxes left by bin directly in front of 81 Stoke Newington Church Street N16 0AS. This is normally collected daily but has not been collected for several days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip of metal rods, large boxes etc, 13th March
item.description:
Mixture of large cardboard boxes, building materials and metal rods (scaffolding?) dumped on the pavement by the old police station and before the butchers shop, Penge high street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 150, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin, 13th March
item.description:
No category on your list so I used letter bin, to say Thursday is our bin collection day up here on Shooters Hill. As far as I can see around Shooters Hill the blue top bins were not emptied. Certainly they were not collected in Hill End & Donaldson Rd Shooters Hill.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hill End, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
